c: 现在你们去做工吧！
那么，现在上来吧！
好的，我们现在开饭吧。
e: Now get to work.
Now then, up again!
Ok, let's eat now.

c: 你们都明白了吗？
你明白了吗？
我们明白了——那么，我们在那了吗？
e: Do you all understand ?
Do you understand?
We see... so, are we there yet?

c: 有三百年吗？
他是个二百五。
今天有一百多号人出工。
e: Three hundred years?
He's a rather stupid person.
Over a hundred people went to work today.

c: 你对我们帮助很大。－哪里，哪里。
学汉语对在中国工作有帮助。
我们要去帮助那些不会说北京话的游客。
e: You gave us a lot of help. - It was nothing.
Learning Chinese is helpful for working in China.
We're going to help tourists who can't speak Mandarin.

c: 我后来觉得他是想要看看报纸上有没有说什么。
你那儿有今天的报纸吗？
我有一次在报纸上看到他和一个出租车司机有些问题。
e: To see if there was something in the paper, I suppose.
Do you have today's newspaper over there?
I read something that he had some problem with a taxi driver.

c: A热天比冷天好！
我们老师的个子比我们的高。
我做的爱国的事比他多很多。
e: AThe hot weather is better than the cold!
Our teacher is taller than we are.
I have done much more patriotic work than him.

c: 我在学校里还有一些别的朋友。
是的。今天，做别人不想做的事。
他不喜欢别人叫他的外号。
e: I have some other friends at school.
Yes.Today, people do not want to do.
He doesn' t like others to call him by his nickname.

c: 你的孩子现在都长大了。
作为一名大学校长，我喜欢我的工作。
他长的什么样儿？
e: Your children have sprung up now.
I like my job as university president.
What does he look like?

c: 我听见他们在唱歌。
我听见她唱歌！
我喜欢唱歌。
e: I heard them singing.
I hear her sing!
I like singing.

c: 姐姐，那个出家人在看你呢。
他是哪年出生的？
她看了电影后坐出租车回家。
e: Elder sister, that family at see you.
When was he born?
She took a taxi home after she saw the film.

c: 这衣服穿在我身上好看吗？
这不是我穿的号。
我穿这件看起来怎么样？
e: How do I look in this new dress?
This is not my size.
How does this look on me?

c: 我们明天中午开船。
船现在的最大吃水是多少？
你船的前吃水是多少？
e: We sail at noon tomorrow.
What is her maximum draught now?
What is your draft forward?

c: 这是我人生中的第一次做爱。
请再说一次。
你是什么时候第一次来中国的？
e: This was the first sex of my life.
Once again,please.
When did you first come over to China?

c: 我学习他的书也学习从他的做人。
太太:"不，先生，没有我他从来不出去."
不，我从不坐出租车去。
e: I learned from the books but also from the man.
No, Sir, he does not go out without me.
No, I never go by taxi.

c: 是的，你听的没错。
老师：为什么你一天里能做错那么多事！
是的，你没有听错。
e: Yes, you heard right.
Teacher: How can you make so many mistakes in just one day?
Yes, you heard me right.

c: NA
NA
当然，她不是个大家闺秀，但却受过上等教育，多才多艺，也很有钱，极其喜欢他的朋友。
我觉得他是不是也给她说这样的恭维话，发现她是位大家闺秀，我怎么也无法相信。
至于思嘉，他高兴地看到，她似乎在想旁的事情，像个大家闺秀的样子。
e: She was certainly not a woman of family, but well educated, accomplished, rich, and excessively in love with his friend.
I doubt whether he will return the compliment, and discover her to be a lady. I could not have believed it!
Puss, he was glad to notice, appeared to be thinking of other matters as a lady should.

c: 我：但是上星期，同样大小的鱼你说十二。
但是，为什么汉人认为他们是汉人呢？
但是他们是怎样在一起的呢？
e: Me: "But last week same size fish, you say twelve".
But why did the Chinese think of themselves as Chinese?
But how had they ever come together?

c: 我是怎样做到这些的？
什么？你怎么做到的？
你是怎么做到的？
e: How have I done all this?
What?! How did you do that?
What have you done?

c: 我觉得你可能会很出名的。
你来得那么晚是不对的。
“我不得不做这个，”我想。
e: I think that you could be famous.
It was wrong of you to come so late.
"I have to do this, " we think to ourselves.

c: 我觉得你可能会很出名的。
你来得那么晚是不对的。
“我不得不做这个，”我想。
e: I think that you could be famous.
It was wrong of you to come so late.
"I have to do this, " we think to ourselves.

c: 站在那儿的那个男孩子是你弟弟吧？
和弟弟跑步吧。
我弟弟是一个听话的男孩。
e: A:Is that boy standing there your brother?
Run with (your) brother.
My brother is an obedient boy.

c: 这是我人生中的第一次做爱。
你是什么时候第一次来中国的？
这是开学的第一天。
e: This was the first sex of my life.
When did you first come over to China?
The first day of school.

c: 我听不懂你说了些什么。
对不起，我没听懂你说的。
你听懂我在说什么了吗？
e: I did not understand what you said.
Sorry, I didn' t catch you.
Do you follow what I'm saying?

c: 他们在北京大学上学时在一个房间里住了三年。
那一天房间里人很多，全都是不认识的。
她出租房间给学生住。
e: They roomed together in Beijing University for three years.
There were so many people in the office that day and they were all strangers.
She rents out rooms to students.

c: 我妈妈做的饭非常好吃。
我听完后，非常不服气，朋友看了看我，带有轻视的语气说：“怎么样？
这样，大人们会非常高兴认识这样一位识时务的人。
e: The food that mom makes is very delicious.
" I've finished, very defy spirit, friends looked at me with contempt, the tone say: "how are you?
And the grown-up would be greatly pleased to have met such a sensible man.

c: 有客人来了我的服务员在哪里？
她是饭店的女服务员。
穿红衣服的是服务员。
e: We have customers! Where are my waitresses?
She is a waitress in a restaurant.
The waiter dressed in red.

c: 谢谢你。今儿个很高兴。
我是你师姐呢？我分高！
很高兴你喜欢！
e: SAM: Thank you. Glad to.
Timeless, so let me love you more!
Glad you like it!

c: 请你告诉我在什么时候下车好吗？
我告诉她，我会去看她的。
他告诉我们什么时候吃饭。
e: Would you please tell me when to get off?
I told her I should go to see her.
He told us when to eat.

c: 我的哥哥还不到二十五岁。
我有两个姐姐和一个哥哥。
书是哥哥的。
e: My brother is not quite twenty-five.
I have two sisters and one brother.
The book is my older brother's.

c: 我今天下午能给你一个小时。
要是你给他去了电话，他会来的。
请在来日上午给我打电话。
e: I can give you one hour this afternoon.
He would have come if you had phoned him.
Please ring me up tomorrow morning.

NA
现在北京市场上可以买到500多公斤的“牛奶西瓜”。
请给我一公斤鸡蛋。
我的体重是七十七公斤。
e: More than 500 kg of \\\""milk watermelons\\\"" are available at Beijing markets now.
Please give me one kilogram of eggs.
My weight is 77 kilograms.

c: 我现在工作的这个公司里尽是那些小里小气的人。
你在哪家公司做事？
那么问题来了：你是在做生意呢，还是在开公司呢？
e: This company I''m with now has too many bean counters.
What company do you work for?
So, the questions is; are you a business or a company?

c: 这本书不贵。
那个不怎么贵。
那衣服太昂贵，我买不起。
e: This book is not expensive.
That's not very expensive.
The dress is too expensive for me to buy.

c: 我在学校里还有一些别的朋友。
好的，中号还是大号？
再说，我还有两个女儿，我。
e: I have some other friends at school.
OK. Medium size or large.?
And then, I have my daughters.

c: 我在三天前生的第二个孩子。
孩子们有时也会很气人的。
你的孩子喜欢水果吗？
e: Ihad our second child three days ago.
Children can sometimes be very trying.
Do your kids like fruit?

c: 太好吃了！
这个苹果很好吃。
这家饭店菜很好吃。
e: It was just too delicious!
This apple is very tasty.
The dishes in this restaurant are very delicious.

c: 你是中号的。
你在我的号子里做什么？
今天是几月几号？
e: You're a medium.
What are you doing in my cell?
What is the date today?

c: 和我一样黑。
当你叫我黑人的时候，我说是。
同朋客一样，在很多时候，人们分不出谁是电脑空间的痞子，谁是真正的黑客。
e: Black like me.
When you call me black, I say yes.
The same as the friend guest, frequently, it is the ruffian in the Cyberspace who people can not tell, Who is the real hacker.

c: 对了，她现在是小红帽了。
这红字是不是他的记号？
你买什么了？我买了一些西红柿。
e: Yes , she is now little red riding hood .
And is this his mark?
What did you buy? I bought some tomatoes.

c: 欢迎你来我家。
欢迎来到我的家。
欢迎来到饭店的游泳馆。
e: You are welcome in my house.
Welcome to my home.
Welcome to our swimming pool, sir.

c: 我在学校里还有一些别的朋友。
好的，中号还是大号？
再说，我还有两个女儿，我。
e: I have some other friends at school.
OK. Medium size or large.?
And then, I have my daughters.

c: 我的回答是什么？
他们回答说，没有。
“不是，”我回答。
e: What was my response?
They answered him, No.
"No," I replied.

c: 他们一起去机场了。
我现在在机场。
我在机场工作了三年了。
e: They went to the airport together.
I'm at the airport now.
I've been working at the airport for three years.

c: 我买了一打鸡蛋。
我妈妈买了一打鸡蛋。
你喜欢吃鸡蛋吗？
e: I bought a dozen eggs.
My mother bought a dozen eggs.
Do you like egg?

c: 就是出租车后面的一件！
这件上衣对我来说太小了。
这件大衣有大号吗？
e: Just one behind in the taxi!
This coat is too small for me.
Do you have the coat in large?

c: 他坐在教室的前面。（在教室里面）
这是我们的教室。
学生们在一间明亮的教室里上课。
e: He sat in the front of the classroom.
This is our classroom.
The students have their class in a bright classroom.

c: 姐姐，那个出家人在看你呢。
我的姐姐？
你和你姐姐都这么说。
e: Elder sister, that family at see you.
My sisters?
You and your sister said so yourselves.

c: 你怎么认识这些介绍人的？
我来介绍一下我的朋友。
让我给你介绍一个朋友。
e: How do you know these references?
Let me introduce my friends.
Allow me to introduce a friend to you.

c: 他们叫他进去。
我看见她开车进去了。
但是你怎么能说服这些人住进这些小房子里呢？
e: They bade him enter.
I saw her drive in.
But how do you convince someone to live this small?

c: 他年近四十。
而在最近一天的一个中午，一些孩子说他们没有吃的。
将近三十年前，在一个八月的下午，我离家出走后再也没有回去。
e: He is near forty.
At noon, one recent day, several said that they had had nothing to eat.
Nearly thirty years ago, on an August afternoon, I ran away from home and never made it back.

c: 就是出租车后面的一件！
晚上他不是看电视，就是看书。
这一点他们从小就学会了。
e: Just one behind in the taxi!
He either watches TV or reads books in the evening.
They learn that from an early age.

c: 我觉得你可能会很出名的。
你觉得东京怎么样？
你觉得她们喜欢我么？
e: I think that you could be famous.
How do you find Tokyo?
Do you think they like me?

c: 谢谢。去喝点儿咖啡怎么样？
我从来不喝咖啡。
您想喝点儿什么，咖啡、茶，还是可乐？
e: Thank you.How about some coffee?
I never drink coffee.
Would you like to drink something, coffee, tea or cola?

c: 到了这里一个月以后，学生们开始想家了。
他是去年六月开始在这里工作的。
这个学期三月一日开始。
e: The students began to feel homesick after they had been here for a month.
He started work here last June.
This term will begin on March 1st.

c: 我要怎样为这些考试做准备？
他考试得了百分。
你有想过报考国家公务员考试吗？
e: How do I prepare for the exams?
He obtained 100 marks in his examination.
Have you ever thought about entering for the national public servant examination?

c: 我觉得你可能会很出名的。
现在，我们这里可能七个月不下雨。
我有时会想，“她怎么可能会看上我呢？
e: I think that you could be famous.
Now we can go seven months without rain.
Sometimes I think: "How can she be this attracted to me?

c: 什么时候都可以来我这里。
你对男人说，大后天我不工作，我们可以一起出去。
你什么时候想来见我都可以。
e: Drop in on me at any time.
You said to the man, and the day after that I don't work, we can go out.
Come and see me whenever you want to .

c: 他昨天没来上课。
我喜欢你上课。
你怎么去上课呢？
e: He didn't come to class yesterday.
I like your class.
How do you go to class?

c: 我们都喜欢开快车。
下一班快车是什么时候？
校车快开了。
e: We all like to drive fast.
When is the next express?
The school bus is about to start.

c: 和你做生意是一件快乐的事情。
你是我所有的快乐，我的希望，我的歌。
你就是我的快乐。
e: Its a pleasure to do business with you.
You are all my pleasure, my hope and my song.
You are my Joy.

c: 我太累了不想做饭了。我们上馆子怎么样？
我累了，想去睡觉了。
今天我很累，我想我没有力气去逛商店了。
e: I'm too tired to cook. Shall we eat out tonight?
I'm tired and I want to go to sleep.
I am so tired.I don't think I feel up to going shopping today.

c: 你怎么能就那样离开了我们？
他开始和桌子跟前的人们说话，离开了我。
他离开这里怕有二十天了。
e: How could you leave us like that?
He starts talking to people at the table, away from me.
He left here for probably 20 days (I'm afraid).

c: 是的，我两小时前吃的早饭。
你有两下子。
小样的，你有两下子！
e: Yes, I had breakfast two hours ago.
You have two down sons .
Small one, you have two down son.

c: 哪路车去那里？
我在他回家的路上遇见他。
对他们来说，一份好工作是最好的出路。
e: Which bus goes there?
I saw him on his way home.
A good job would be the best way out.

c: 你喜欢旅游吗？
他们一起旅游。
这是旅游中介。
e: Do you like traveling?
They traveled together.
This is a travel agent.

c: 你卖吗？我是说你的汽车？
他不是出卖我们的人。
他是做学问的人，不会做买卖。
e: Do you sell? I mean your car?
He is not the man selling us.
He's a scholar and no businessman.

c: 我慢了下来。
你慢点儿吃。
请说慢一点儿。
e: I slow down.
Don't rush through your meal.
Please speak more slowly.

c: 他们在忙些什么？
这么些年来你都在忙什么呢？
你在那儿忙什么呢？
e: What are they about?
What have you been up to all these years?
What are you hustling about there ?

c: 他以前每天上午都去商店买东西。
我们每天都去上学。
不，我们每个都是不同的。
e: He used to go shopping every morning.
We go to school every day.
No. We each are different.

c: 我家有妈妈、爸爸、妹妹和我。
和她的妹妹做爱。
妹妹：“请住手！”对我说“请住手！”
e: In my family there is mum, dad, my sister and me.
Sleep with her sister.
My sister: "PLEASE STOP TELLING ME TO PLEASE STOP SAYING PLEASE STOP!"

c: 对不起，没门儿。
他是在他大四的第二个学期，上的这门课。
这间商店什么时候开门？
e: Sorry, no way.
And he was taking this class second semester of his senior year.
When will the shop open?

c: 你对男人说，大后天我不工作，我们可以一起出去。
有时他们一起出去---我妻子，那个男人还有他的女朋友。
我就是这些男人中的一个。
e: You said to the man, and the day after that I don't work, we can go out.
Sometimes they went out together - my wife, the man, his girlfriend.
One of those men was me.

c: 我们都爱您，妈妈。
您这是客店吗？
请问您打开这一个，好吗？
e: We all love you, mom.
Is this an inn?
Would you open this one, please?

c: 我每天早上都喝牛奶。
请给我热一些牛奶。
所有的牛奶都在那。
e: I drink milk every morning.
Please heat me some milk.
All (of) the milk is there.

c: 那女人怎么样？
那里面的女人是谁？
那个女人你认识吗？
e: What about the woman?
Who is the lady in it?
That woman do you know her?

c: 还是你旁边的那个人？
第二天晚上，她坐到了我的旁边。
过来坐在我们旁边吧。
e: Or onto the person next to you?
The second night she sat next to me.
Come and sit beside us.

c: 我最喜欢足球、跑步和游泳。
你们一起跑步吗？
我喜欢跑步。
e: I like football, running and swimming most.
Do you run together?
I like running.

c: 但是也有一些便宜的票。
这车卖得非常便宜。
它是便宜的，但是它是好的。
e: But they also have cheaper tickets.
The car went very cheap.
It is cheap but it is nice.

c: 那么是否有星期六的票呢？
这样我们这边就有六票了。
她们已经买好了飞机票。
e: Are there tickets for Saturday then?
So now we have six here.
They have bought their air tickets already.

c: 有时他们一起出去---我妻子，那个男人还有他的女朋友。
他的妻子在后面叫他，但是他没有听见。
看电视时，我妻子喜欢吃一些花生。
e: Sometimes they went out together - my wife, the man, his girlfriend.
His wife called after him, but he didn't hear.
My wife likes to nosh peanuts while watching TV.

c: 上星期天我十点钟起床。
什么时候你会起床和什么时候你将睡觉。
那个病人起床外出走动了。
e: I got up at ten last Sunday.
What time would you wake up and go to bed?
The patient was out and about.

c: 我想，他是个老千。
他是个老千。
这所学校学生最多的时候有三千人。
e: I think he is a swindler.
He is a card shark!
The school's enrolment at its height reached 3, 000.

c: 今天天气晴。
今天看上去是个晴天。
今天是晴天。
e: The weather today is sunny
Looks like a fine day today.
Today is sunny day.

c: 我是去年八月来北京的。
去年是牛年。
他是去年六月开始在这里工作的。
e: It was last August that I came to Beijing.
Last year was the year of the ox.
He started work here last June.

c: 让我在这里下车。
请让我在这里下车。
为了表现我的爱，我会让一个女人做什么呢？
e: Let me off here.
Let me off here,please.
What would I have a woman do to show me love?

c: 他们在那里上班？
你在哪里上班？
我生病了，不能去上班了。
e: Where do they work?
Where do you work?
I'm sick, can't go to work.

c: 你的同学身体怎么样了？好多了，昨天出院了。
他们也出卖身体。
这就是她的身体。
e: How is your classmate? He is getting better, he left the hospital yesterday.
They also sold themselves.
This was her body.

c: 我生病了，不能去上班了。
他今天没来，许是生病了。
你是一个生病的龟儿子。
e: I'm sick, can't go to work.
He didn't come today; perhaps he's ill.
You are a sick son of a bitch.

c: 我会来做生日衣。
下星期是他的生日。
你的生日是哪天？
e: I'll make the shroud.
Next week is his birthday.
When was your birthday?

c: 我的老天，时间那么晚了。
你学汉语学了多长时间？五年了。
我没时间去北京。
e: My God, it's late.
How long have you been learning Chinese? I have been learning Chinese for 5 years.
I don't have time to go to Beijing.

c: 在这些事情上我们都听她的。
他同样喜欢做这样的事情。
和你做生意是一件快乐的事情。
e: We all defer to her in these matters.
He liked to do the same.
Its a pleasure to do business with you.

c: 我也有一块这样的手表。
它不是手表。
爸爸买了一块新手表。
e: I also have a watch like this.
It is not a watch.
Dad bought a new watch.

c: 你有什么手机呢？
那个手机是谁的？
我的手机在桌子上。
e: What phone do you have?
Whose cellphone is that?
My cellphone is on the table.

c: “那么，什么也不送，我的小姐？”我说。
我送你一本书。
这是人家送的，不是买动的。
e: Nor anything at all, then, my lady,' I said.
I give you a book as a gift.
It is a present, not a purchase.

c: 所以，我们都不喜欢这的菜？
我女儿今天有点不舒服，所以她没去上学。
对的，所以你有这个--这是一个有点傻的东西。
e: So none of us ever liked this diner?
My daughter's a bit poorly today, so she didn't go to school.
Right. So you have this -- it's kind of a stupid thing.

c: 好的，那它们有什么共同点么？
不，它不是我的小车。
为什么它们老是这样做？！
e: Okay, is there anything common to them?
No, it isn't my car.
Why do they always do that?!

c: 我在上学的时候，喜欢踢球。
我从来不踢足球。
我从来不错过踢足球的机会。
e: I in school, like playing football.
I never play soccer.
I never miss a chance of playing football.

c: 请你不要小题大作好吗？
你太小题大做了。
我们工作中出现了不少问题。
e: Don't make such a fuss,will you?
You make too much fuss about trifles.
A lot of problems come up in our work.

c: 我喜欢游泳和跳舞。
她认识很多女孩，她们每星期六外出跳舞。
所以我天天跳舞。
e: I like swimming and dancing.
She knows lots of girls who go out dancing every Saturday.
So I dance daily.

c: 我喜欢北外的老师。
一天，我在商场里看见两个外国人在买东西。
他不喜欢别人叫他的外号。
e: I love the tutors in Beiwai.
One day I saw two foreigners shopping in the mall.
He doesn' t like others to call him by his nickname.

c: 吃完饭再看电视。
你吃完了吗？
她说：『那个昨天你吃完了。』
e: Have your dinner before you watch TV.
Have you finished?
She said "You finished that yesterday!

c: 我喜欢和她一起玩。
你能过来我家和我的狗狗玩儿吗？
他在玩，没有学习。
e: I like playing with her.
Can you come over and play with my dog?
He is playing, not studying.

c: 晚上他不是看电视，就是看书。
你昨天晚上为什么没打电话？
大家晚上好。
e: He either watches TV or reads books in the evening.
Why didn't you telephone last night?
Good evening, everybody.

c: 她为他生了个漂亮的儿子。
你为什么不和我一起去商店呢？
他为什么不对她说明呢？
e: She gave him a handsome son.
Why don' t you come with me to the store?
Why did he not tell her so?

c: 他们问他说：“夫子，什么时候有这事呢？
我问她说：‘你是谁的女儿？
“你们的房钱是多少？”她问。
e: Teacher," they asked, "when will these things happen?
I asked her, 'Whose daughter are you?
"What are your rates?" she inquired.

c: 我们工作中出现了不少问题。
看起来是不会有什么问题的。
现在的问题不是读什么书而是怎样读书。
e: A lot of problems come up in our work.
By the look of it there won't be any problems.
The problem now is not what to read, but how to read.

c: 我喜欢西瓜。
请吃块西瓜。
天气太热了，家里有西瓜吗？
e: I love watermelon.
Please have a piece of watermelon.
The weather is too hot, do we have any watermelons?

c: 我们希望他们上好大学。
我希望这本书的字再大一点儿。
我希望您能有机会再次来中国做客。
e: We want them to go to good colleges.
I wish this book was written in bigger character.
If you have a chance, I hope you can come to China for another visit.

c: 谁来做饭？谁来洗衣？
没有洗衣机他们怎么洗衣服？
他回来的时候，我正在洗衣服呢！
e: Who does the laundry?
How did they do the laundry without washing machines?
He came back just I was washing the clothes!

c: 这个学生向他的老师请了假。
好好学习，天天向上。
她向下看了看。
e: The student asked his teacher for leave.
Study well and make progress every day.
Then she looked down.

c: 他睡了八个小时。
我看了一小时的书。
一个小时多少钱？
e: He slept eight hours.
I have been reading books for one hour.
How much per hour?

c: 我喜欢和朋友一起大笑。
什么这么好笑的？
有什么好笑的吗？
e: I like to laugh with my friends.
What's so funny?
Is there any funny?

c: 现在是一个新月到我这里来。
新学期我有一个新同桌。
我喜欢我的新同桌。
e: It's now a new moon to me.
I have a new deskmate this new term.
I like my new deskmate.

c: 中国人的姓在名字的前面。
“请在这张表里写下你的姓名和住址”，他说,“然后我会打个电话。
请你拼一下你的姓好吗？
e: Chinese people's surname is put before the given name.
"Please write your name and address on this form," he said. "Then I have to make a call.
Would you please spell your last name?

c: 上午为什么不休息呢？
她说“我现在最想休息。”
请在休息室等候。
e: Why not rest this morning?
''I want to rest, '' she said.
Please wait in the lobby.

c: 太多的大雪在十一月。
你们那里冬天时会下雪吗？
下了一场小雪。
e: Too much snow in November.
Do you have snow in winter?
There has been a light snow.

c: 在所有的颜色中，我最喜欢白色。
我看好了它的颜色。
你要哪样颜色的？
e: Of all the colors, I love white best.
B:But I like its color.
What colour do you want?

c: 他们对他说，你的眼睛是怎吗开的呢。
我的妈妈是老师。她的工作在一个中学在乐清市。她开车去上班。她是一个好老师在我的眼睛里。
您可能会看见狗狗眼睛的眼白。
e: Therefore said they unto him, How were thine eyes opened?
My mother is teacher. She works in a middle school in Yue Qing. She goes to work by car. She is a very good teacher in my eyes.
You may see the whites of the eyes.

c: 我也喜欢小羊肉。
羊肉真好吃！
有些人不爱吃羊肉。
e: I like lamb, too.
The lamb is delicious.
Some people don't like to eat mutton.

c: 我开始吃药的时候会有些什么感觉？
每四小时服药一次。
我到哪里可以买些药？
e: How will I feel once I start taking this medicine?
Take the medicine every four hours.
Where can I buy some medicine?

c: 书桌要怎么分呢？
要是你给他去了电话，他会来的。
我今天没什么要做的。
e: What about the desks?
He would have come if you had phoned him.
I have nothing to do today.

c: 我学习他的书也学习从他的做人。
我再也没有去过那个院子。
在国会中也有不少。
e: I learned from the books but also from the man.
I never went back to that yard.
Neither have some in Congress.

c: 我已经写了三个小时了。
有些学生在出发前，已经在北京做了几个星期的热身。
她对我的热情已经冷下来了。
e: I've been writing for three hours.
Some students will also have done a few weeks' warm-up in Beijing.
Her passion for me has cooled down.

c: 他们在一起做爱。
你想不想和我们一起去？
你和你的家人住在一起吗？
e: They made love together.
Would you like to go with us?
Do you live with your family?

c: 我这样说的意思是什么呢？
我听说今年是狗年。那是什么意思？
你说这些话是什么意思？
e: What do I mean by this?
I heard this year is the year of the Dog. What does it mean?
What do you intend for your words?

c: 昨天是阴天。
明天是阴天。
今天天气阴。
e: It was cloudy yesterday.
Tomorrow will be overcast.
The weather today is overcast.

c: “我做这个是因为我喜欢,”这个电影明星说道在这么多工作中游走。”
我不再说了，因为没有什么好说的。
因为在他年老的时候，我给他生了一个儿子。
e: "I'm doing it because I love it," the star has said of juggling so many jobs.
I'll say no more,because there is no more to say.
Yet I have borne him a son in his old age.

c: 你想和我们一起去游泳吗？
他也会游泳。
你们去哪里游泳呢？
e: Do you want to go swimming with us?
He can also swim.
Where do you go swimming?

c: 我的右边，穿过过道，都是女孩子。
我站在她的右边。
右边是一个足球场，两个篮球场。
e: On my right, across the aisle, were the girls.
I stood at her right.
On the right there is a football field and two basketball courts.

c: 我：但是上星期，同样大小的鱼你说十二。
他不喜欢吃鱼。
猫喜欢吃鱼。
e: Me: "But last week same size fish, you say twelve".
He doesn't care for fish.
A cat likes to eat fish.

c: 我可以在这个旅馆里换日元吗？
每月四千元。
可他们回答道，我们只用一元店的便宜本子来工作。
e: Can I exchange "yen" in this hotel?
Four thousand yuan per month.
They replied that they used Dollar Store (i.e. cheap) notebooks for their work.

c: 来回有多远？
他的名字将和我们学校的名字永远联系在一起。
他远不是我想象的那样。
e: How far is it there and back?
His name will always be twinned with that of our school.
He is far from what I expected.

c: 我喜欢运动和唱歌。你喜欢运动吗？
我喜欢运动和唱歌。
他们都喜欢球，都爱好运动。
e: I like sports and singing. Do you like sports?
I like sports and singing.
They all loved balls, they loved sport.

c: 他打电话来说再见。
他不会再说什么了。
下个星期五再见。
e: He called in to say goodbye.
He would say no more.
See you next Friday.

c: 我今天早上给你的那个。
今天早上我做了些茶点。
早上的东西就这几样了。
e: The one I gave you this morning.
I made tea cookies this morning.
That's all the breakfast items we have left.

c: 这是个星期六，在星期天这里的商店都不开张。
这是一张桌子。
他们今天为什么不去小张家？
e: It' s Saturday, and in this land nothing opens on Sundays.
It is a table.
Why are they not going to Xiao Zhang's house today?

c: 你的孩子现在都长大了。
作为一名大学校长，我喜欢我的工作。
他长的什么样儿？
e: Your children have sprung up now.
I like my job as university president.
What does he look like?

c: 我认识她的丈夫，但我一时想不起他的名字。
她和她的丈夫“几经分离，”他说到。
她的丈夫是个水手。
e: I know her husband, but I cannot call his name back for the moment.
She and her husband "had separated on several occasions," he said.
Her husband is a sailor.

c: 我不在的时候有没有人打电话找我？
你会在那里找到什么呢？
她想找一个工作。
e: Did anyone call for me while I was out?
What would you find there?
She wants to find a job.

c: 说下去，我在听着。
谢谢。我会试着做做看的。
你说什么来着？
e: Go on, I'm listening.
Thanks.I will try to do so.
Did you say anything?

c: 真的吗？好的，我会试看看的。
你的名字真好听！我喜欢你的名字！
我真的很喜欢电脑。
e: Lily: Really? Ok, I would try it.
You have a nice name! I like your name!
I really like computers.

c: 他们正在开会。
我们正在看电视。
孩子们正在学习读书写字。
e: They're at a meeting.
We are watching TV.
The children are learning to read and write.

c: 你太客气了，我知道这对你来说是一次好机会。
我怎样想知道你是什么。
你知道他什么时候会回来？
e: Bob: You are welcome. I know it is a good chance for you.
How I wonder what you are.
Do you know when he will be back?

c: 你准备什么时候走就走。
那么，你没事吧？准备好去开会了吗？
你明天准备做些什么？
e: Leave whenever you're ready.
So, you okay? You ready for the meeting?
What will you do tomorrow?

c: 一个篮子在这个自行车上。
但是下一天这个小女孩也有了一样的自行车。
你怎么骑着自行车就跑来了，不是说好开你的新车来接我吗？
e: A basket is on the bike?
But the next day, the little girl has the same bike.
LL: I never said "new car", I said "new ride". What, don't you like it?

c: “我做这个是因为我喜欢,”这个电影明星说道在这么多工作中游走。”
你是怎样走出来的？
你听见他走出去吗？
e: "I'm doing it because I love it," the star has said of juggling so many jobs.
How do you sort that out?
Did you hear him go out?

c: 你最喜欢哪个国家，为什么？
你最喜欢哪一个？
你是他见得最多的人吗？
e: Which country do you like best, and why?
Which do you like best?
Were you the person he saw most?

c: 我不在这里，不在那里，在那里——再左边一点点。耶，那就是我。
请在我的左边坐下。
最左边的是哥哥的妻子。
e: I am neither here nor there, but there - a little to the left. Yeah. That's me.
Please sit on my left.
On the leftmost is my brother´s wife.
